meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Fix Slow Dev Cycles (Beginner Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop grinding through slow development. Learn how to optimize your freelance pitching and shipping workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from manual boilerplate and inefficient feedback loops. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated iterative refactoring, you can cut dev time by 70%. Master this high-velocity workflow to pitch premium, high-margin AI solutions to clients without burning out.
content.intro:
The screen glows at 2:00 AM, and you’re still wrestling with a boilerplate you should have finished hours ago. You are trading your life for billable hours, trapped in a cycle of manual configuration while your competitors are already shipping production-ready AI agents to clients. The bottleneck isn't your coding ability; it's your lack of an industrial-grade assembly line.

It is time to stop building from scratch and start orchestrating. By integrating Antigravity for structural precision and Claude Code for real-time execution, you transform from a struggling freelancer into a high-velocity AI architect. This checklist bridges the gap between slow, manual labor and the rapid, profitable deployment your clients demand.

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Define the core features of your client's request to ensure zero scope creep while setting up the foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular, scalable project architecture for a SaaS MVP focusing on low-latency AI responses and clean, maintainable code structures.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing auth and database schemas by hand. Use AI to generate the heavy lifting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure authentication schema and database migration script for a multi-tenant user environment using Supabase.

steps.title: Build the AI Core
steps.description: Connect the LLM logic to your frontend using optimized API wrappers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust API service layer to interface with Claude 3.5 Sonnet, including rate limiting and error handling logic.

steps.title: Refactor for Production Speed
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your codebase and identify performance bottlenecks before the client sees them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations for faster rendering and reduced API latency.

steps.title: Automate Client Documentation
steps.description: Generate professional technical documentation to justify your premium pricing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise, professional technical README and API documentation for this project suitable for a non-technical client.

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context File' for Claude Code to keep the AI aware of your specific project conventions and coding style.
Never ship code without running a Claude Code 'diff' check—it catches subtle bugs that human eyes miss.
Use Antigravity to generate 'feature flags' early, allowing you to pitch incremental feature updates as recurring revenue.
Maintain a 'Template Library' of successful Antigravity prompts to reduce your setup time to under 10 minutes.
When pitching, focus on the 'Time to Value' metric enabled by your AI stack rather than the number of hours you work.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, audit your workflow to identify the most repetitive 10% of tasks and build a custom CLI alias to automate them using Claude Code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the blueprint to stop trading time for money and start shipping high-impact AI apps at scale. The market is waiting for builders who deliver results, not just hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
